ogTitle: Moorabbin vs Moorabbin Airport: Climate Safety

heading: Moorabbin vs Moorabbin Airport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moorabbin, Victoria and Moorabbin Airport, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moorabbin Airport has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Moorabbin (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moorabbin or Moorabbin Airport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moorabbin has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Moorabbin Airport scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moorabbin scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Moorabbin Airport scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moorabbin or Moorabbin Airport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moorabbin Airport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
